mapper.select: SELECT id, task_id, step_id, tool_name, permission_level, request_json, response_summary, success, error_message, latency_ms, created_at FROM agent_tool_call WHERE task_id = #{taskId} ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT id, task_id, step_id, tool_name, permission_level, request_json, response_summary, success, error_message, latency_ms, created_at FROM agent_tool_call ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT id, task_id, step_id, tool_name, permission_level, request_json, response_summary, success, error_message, latency_ms, created_at FROM agent_tool_call WHERE task_id = #{taskId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
